# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
   name: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  replicas: <desired number> # define this value based on actual usage metrics later, e.g., use auto scaling with k8s inbuilt services or external configuration management systems such as Helm charts etc..
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-microservice  
  template:          
     metadata:         # Pod details for microservices go here       
       labels:                 
          app : NodeJsmicroService                      
     spec:                        
       containers:                  
         - name: nodejs                    
            image: <your private docker registry/node-app>     
             env:                     
               - name: MONGODB_URI                # Environment Variable for database connection string. Use the same in Kubernetes services definition too, not within a container directly here as it's sensitive data and should be stored outside of pod specification  
                 value : mongodb://<your-mongoDB>/mydb 	# Mongodb Connection URI will go to env variable	           
             ports:                      # The port numbers which can communicate with the Pod. Can use hostNetwork if required or specify networkPort on each Container in pods    				   		      			        	   					       	  .      - containerPort : <port>   – protocol TCP/UDP                    							                 },
          resources:            # Request and limit are for CPU memory respectively                                                                                ,           requests:                             {'cpu': '250m', 'memory':'1Gi'}, limits:'{'cpu':’3.6x','memory':‘4Mi’}''   	},      {  containerName : "nodejs"
